items.title: Israel and Lebanon agree 10-day ceasefire, Trump says
items.dek: The US president invites the two countries' leaders to Washington as Israel's prime minister insists troops will not leave southern Lebanon.
items.body: The US president invites the two countries' leaders to Washington as Israel's prime minister insists troops will not leave southern Lebanon.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Rescuers to use air cushions in latest effort to save stranded whale
items.dek: "Timmy" has been stranded in the Baltic Sea for weeks despite several attempts to free the ailing animal.
items.body: "Timmy" has been stranded in the Baltic Sea for weeks despite several attempts to free the ailing animal.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Lawmakers clash with RFK Jr as he shifts focus away from vaccines
items.dek: During a three-hour hearing, the US health secretary tried to focus on chronic disease while being pressed on vaccines.
items.body: During a three-hour hearing, the US health secretary tried to focus on chronic disease while being pressed on vaccines.
